haikus.haiku:
Green leaves dance with cheer,
Flavorful crunch on plates bright,
Nature's gift to us.
Happy #NationalFreshSpinachDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden corn sizzles,
Crispy edges, warm delight,
Flavor pops and sings.
Happy #NationalCornFrittersDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Dancing lights shimmer,
Colors swirl in cheerful glee,
Cake and smiles abound.
#HappyBirthdayGingerRogers from @ClamBakeSanta

content:
Green leaves dance with cheer,
Flavorful crunch on plates bright,
Nature's gift to us.
Happy #NationalFreshSpinachDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Dancing lights shimmer,
Colors swirl in cheerful glee,
Cake and smiles abound.
